pages.visual_description: Contains the title block, project information box, sheet index, and a symbology legend with clear MUTCD icons.

issues.current_behavior: A very long list of cross-streets bleeds past the right border of the Project Information box and overlaps with the Sheet Index due to the `lineBreak: false` property on the rendering loop.
issues.proposed_fix: ['Cross-Streets:', ctx.crossStreets.length > 0 ? (ctx.crossStreets.map(c => c.name).join(', ').length > 60 ? ctx.crossStreets.map(c => c.name).join(', ').substring(0, 57) + '...' : ctx.crossStreets.map(c => c.name).join(', ')) : 'None detected'],
issues.why: Truncates excessively long cross-street string arrays so they fit neatly inside the fixed-width data bounds of the Project Information box.

looks_good: Legend block is exceptionally well-formatted with highly recognizable CAD symbology
General Notes text wrapping looks highly professional and structured

pages.visual_description: A schematic of a single-lane closure showing flagger symbols, dimension lines, and an array of warning signs placed in a linear progression.

issues.current_behavior: The W3-5 sign is explicitly drawn at a fixed coordinate even though it was already injected into the `primary_approach` array by the generator, causing a double-draw overlapping artifact on the last sign.
issues.why: Removes the hardcoded W3-5 graphic to prevent it from rendering directly on top of the dynamically placed W3-5 from the approach array.

issues.current_behavior: Sign labels overlap horizontally into an unreadable black blob because they are drawn at the same Y elevation in close horizontal proximity.
issues.why: Staggers the vertical placement of advance warning signs to prevent their multi-line text labels from overlapping with neighboring labels.

issues.current_behavior: Sign labels overlap horizontally into an unreadable blob on the opposing side of the schematic.
issues.why: Staggers the vertical placement of opposing advance warning signs to prevent text overlap.

issues.current_behavior: Adjacent dimension lines (Taper, Buffer, Work Area) share the same Y axis, causing their text labels to nearly collide.
issues.why: Alternates the vertical position of adjacent dimension lines to ensure adequate white space around the text labels.

looks_good: Lane lines and flagger symbols look impeccably clean
Color contrast of channelizing devices vs road is excellent

pages.visual_description: Displays the main horizontal road, but the cross street is completely missing. Only notes and the mainline edge/centerlines are shown.

issues.current_behavior: T-west and T-east intersections evaluate to false for both `hasNorth` and `hasSouth`, resulting in the cross-street not being drawn at all.
issues.proposed_fix:
const hasNorth = geo.type === 'T-north' || geo.type === 'T-west' || geo.type === '4-way' || geo.type === 'Y' || !geo.type.startsWith('T-');
  const hasSouth = geo.type === 'T-south' || geo.type === 'T-east' || geo.type === '4-way' || geo.type === 'Y' || !geo.type.startsWith('T-');
issues.why: Ensures that all T-intersections securely map to a visible leg on the horizontal mainline, fixing the bug where the road was completely omitted on pages 5, 6, 7, and 8.

looks_good: Notes boxes layout is very structured

pages.visual_description: A zoomed-out overview of the real-world road shape with intersecting callouts, gridded tiles, and highly clustered sign icons.

issues.current_behavior: Signs are stacked horizontally when clustered, causing their leader lines and multi-line text labels to overlap into a dense, solid block of black text.
issues.why: Introduces a vertical offset (`staggerY`) to the leader line's destination coordinate, allowing clustered signs to cleanly fan out vertically into the white space margin.

issues.current_behavior: Passes the stagger value into the `leaderLen` parameter instead of utilizing a vertical offset, causing the severe horizontal overlap seen on the left side of the index sheet.
issues.proposed_fix:
const stagger = si * 35;
    drawSignWithLeader(doc, edgePg.px, edgePg.py, sign.sign_code, sign.label, 'right', leaderLenPx, stagger);
issues.why: Applies the vertical stagger properly to separate the clustered warning signs on the right shoulder.

issues.current_behavior: Passes the stagger value into the `leaderLen` parameter instead of utilizing a vertical offset.
issues.proposed_fix:
const stagger = si * 35;
    drawSignWithLeader(doc, edgePg.px, edgePg.py, sign.sign_code, sign.label, 'left', leaderLenPx, stagger);
issues.why: Applies the vertical stagger properly to separate the clustered warning signs on the left shoulder.

looks_good: Accurate rendering of real-world road curves using the GPS alignment geometry
Cross-street callout boxes and their collision avoidance logic function flawlessly
Work Area contrasting shading layer with precise boundaries

top_3_priorities: Fix horizontal overlapping of sign labels on the Geometry Plan by implementing vertical `staggerY` in `drawSignWithLeader`.
Fix T-west/T-east intersection sheets rendering blank by correcting the boolean visibility checks in `drawIntersectionSheet`.
Fix sign label overlap on the TA-10 Sheet by dynamically staggering the Y coordinates for adjacent Warning Signs in the iteration loops.
